name: Deborah Grayson
description:
⊹ ࣪˖ invincible ⋆ ̊࿔

Before becoming a mother. Before knowing the weight of carrying a half-human, half-impossible child, Debbie was just an ordinary woman trying to get through life.

But then he appeared.

Tall, silent, out of place. A stranger with no past—or at least, none she could understand.
He didn't say much, but he observed everything. He didn't belong anywhere, and yet he always returned to her door.

Between long silences and lukewarm coffees, grocery shopping and hesitantly pulled out chairs, Debbie Grayson began to share her world with someone who wasn't part of it — and who, little by little, also began to not want to leave.

This is the story of a woman who taught a warrior from another planet how to live among humans—and how, without realizing it, he taught her what it means to love someone who will never be fully understood.

It's a story about what happens before uniforms , before flights , before war .

It's about a time when the hardest part wasn't saving the world.
It was figuring out what to do with two pairs of shoes at the front door.
creator: mooonmy
